functions.title: Guide Book #125
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #125§r
§lLurknash§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Medium mammal, Animal, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: End Islands.
•§lHealth§r: 20 §o(Wild)§r | 32 §o(Tamed)§r

•§lWalk speed§r: 3.0
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Any meat-type food except fish meats.
•§lHealed by§r: Any meat-type food except fish meats.
•§lBreeds with§r: Any meat-type food except fish meats.
•§lAging by§r: Any meat-

-type food except fish meats.
•§lTamed by§r: Cooked Moa
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Lurknash Meat, & XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Wild)§r: Ender Dragon
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Wild)§r: Players, Small animals, & Villagers.

•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 4-5 §o(Wild)§r | 5-6 §o(Tamed)§r
•Wild Lurknash can randomly sit.
•Tamed Lurknash can be sat down.
•Can slowly regenerate their health

when they sit or sleep.
•Can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•Carrying food will temporarily stop being aggressive towards the mobs they are aggressive with; they will avoid them instead.
•Can broadcast its enemies
